scenarios.starting_prompt: Find all Person nodes in my Neo4j database and return their names.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent to write a Cypher query to find Person nodes. Validate it uses CYPHER 25 prefix, parameters, and LIMIT.

scenarios.starting_prompt: I want to query my graph but I don't know the schema. Help me explore it.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Agent should trigger schema inspection before writing any query. Validate it runs db.schema.visualization() or SHOW INDEXES.

scenarios.starting_prompt: I have a SQL schema with Users, Orders, and Products tables. How should I model this as a graph?
scenarios.conversation_plan: Agent should apply graph modeling patterns: Users and Products as nodes, Orders as either intermediate node or relationship. Should recommend constraints.

scenarios.starting_prompt: I want to add semantic search to my Neo4j database using OpenAI embeddings.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Agent should guide through creating a vector index with correct dimensions for the embedding model and show the SEARCH query pattern.

scenarios.starting_prompt: Build a GraphRAG pipeline that answers questions about my Neo4j knowledge graph.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Agent should use VectorCypherRetriever or HybridCypherRetriever, show retrieval_query with node and score variables, wire up a GraphRAG pipeline.

scenarios.starting_prompt: Load 100k rows from a CSV file into my Neo4j database as Person nodes.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Agent should use LOAD CSV + CALL IN TRANSACTIONS, set batch size, handle type coercion and null values.

scenarios.starting_prompt: Write Python code to connect to Neo4j and find all movies released after 2020.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Agent should use neo4j package (not neo4j-driver), execute_query pattern, proper result handling.

scenarios.starting_prompt: Create a new Neo4j Aura Professional instance in us-east-1.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Agent should use aura-provisioning-skill, show async polling pattern, warn about credentials being downloadable only once.

scenarios.starting_prompt: Run PageRank on my social graph to find the most influential users.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Agent should project the graph first, estimate memory, then run PageRank in stream mode. Should use neo4j-gds-skill not aura-graph-analytics-skill (no Aura context).

scenarios.starting_prompt: I have old Cypher queries using shortestPath() and id(n). Upgrade them to Cypher 25.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Agent should apply migration substitutions: shortestPath → SHORTEST 1 QPE, id(n) → elementId(n), prepend CYPHER 25.
